Ancient Wurm Hide Robe  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 30
INT: +10 MANA: +50
SV FIRE: +15 SV DISEASE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
WT: 5.0 Size: TINY
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Ancient Wurm Hide Robe
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 30
INT: +10 MANA: +50
SV FIRE: +15 SV DISEASE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
WT: 5.0 Size: TINY
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Robe of the Oracle
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):150, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-25 10:12:48
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Dagarn the Destroyer


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded February 1st, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
Post Comment
Why this robe is only so/so
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 1:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246838066
28 posts
for casters ac is neglible. Resists are wonderful, and yes this has great sv's. Int and mana....well it's definately lacking on a robe as rtough to get as this. The two biggest stats caster's need in ToV type situations are Sv's and HP......while this has great sv's...it has no hp. Sv's won't completely block out AoE's and some AoE's are or are nearly unresistable. for that reason HP are HUGE. As a robe with 0 hp....it's not that great.

Xisix Anklebane
60 rogue of Kaizen'X
Emarr
▲ Page top
AC 30!!!!
QuoteReply
# Nov 14 2001 at 5:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764262734
27 posts
AC 30 wow!!! you casters can now absorb one more point of damage, gratz!!!!
▲ Page top
RE: AC 30!!!!
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2002 at 5:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759644048
44 posts
lmao
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 26 2001 at 11:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) My god, Only an IDIOT would complain about this robe not having HP. 100hp isnt even one hit at the level you get this thing. if a caster gets aggroed he is dead. No amount of HP items will save him. Resists are INFINATELY more important (to resist AOE's) 30AC on a robe is ******* incredible, as are 15 to all resists. And you STILL get 10 int and 50mana. This is UBER loot off an UBER mob. Only a moron would complain about its stats.
RE: retarded
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2002 at 2:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763587688
144 posts
See Rumblecrush and Calamitys end. This Robe is very dissapointing considering it comes of NToV mobs.

Calamitys End has 23 ac, 50 hp, 100 mana 15 to all resists and i forget how much int and other stats. And yes, off 6 kills of RC, we have two CE's. No WAY a robe off a mob that we just killed with 17 people should have better stats than something in NToV. We are just getting into ST and lookin forward to NToV in a few months. What a dissapointment to get there and have a robe like this rot.

Btw, 100hp x 20 slots = 2000 hp that you can use on aoes. Think about the risk vs reward.
▲ Page top
RE: retarded
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2002 at 2:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251850481
11 posts
My GOD Only an IDIOT would say 30 ac on a robe is incredible. At the level required to get this thing, 30 AC won't mean jack when you're fighting mobs that flurry and triple for 350
▲ Page top
RE: retarded
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2003 at 6:04 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763587688
144 posts
Touche, sbrobin. His post was rated so low it got wiped :P.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 09 2001 at 2:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) FOR THE LOVE OF GOD (or Mephistopheles, if you prefer) DONT babble on and on about how it looks and other buttscrapings, list some valuable info like what creature actually dropped it, or just shut up.
RE: INFOURMATION
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2002 at 8:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753507376
16 posts
I got it and wished I didn't. I honestly never wear it. Such a pretty red too. The 15svall is nice, but I lose nearly 100 hp from taking off my Kael quest robe. Trust me, 100 hp is nice. It's 2 more AE's I'd live through, it's more liching I can. It's the difference between 3000hp buffed and 2900hp.
▲ Page top
excellent robe!!
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2001 at 7:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764036108
33 posts
This robe is excellent. The mana and resists are perfect especially for ToV. Hps dont really matter unless youre an enchanter or necro but as a wizard, if i agro a mob, there is very little chance for survival if any at all so the extra 100 hps wouldnt help it were added. I just hope the graphics on this thing are kewl.

Gargen
58 Wiz
▲ Page top
hmmm...
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2001 at 9:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764633424
36 posts
at my level i am beginning to think little of inteligence and more about resists and hp.... kinda forgot that this ad no HP.... kind of a bummer, but i try not to get hit, and if i do get agro'ed i only have about 10 or 15 seconds. maybe less to get away HP's are a big deal. every second counts if this had 100hp... would make for a nicer robe
▲ Page top
Nice resists and AC
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 9:04 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749811190
Sage
295 posts
But no +hp on the robe is painful. If it had +100 HP or so, it'd be a great robe. The real thing I dislike about the robe is how it looks - it is identical to a red senior apprentice robe. Yay.
▲ Page top
RE: Nice resists and AC
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 3:44 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965792734
105 posts
Ummm.... it IS a great robe. I mean 30 is cool, 10int 50mana is cool... but the resists rocks. I would wear this even without the int and mana. Very very nice resists. Resists > all.
▲ Page top
Don't Underestimate the value...
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2001 at 9:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
This robe is excellent. Purely for the resists, I'd say alot of high level casters would wear this since they have beyond 200 INT. Resists on the other hand, are more difficult to come by on the chest pieces.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 30 2001 at 8:50 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) With this much of an AC it is great for necros... when soloing you may need to take some damage for your pet.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 31 2001 at 3:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) thanx for the post deriox, really useful information.
thumbs down
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2001 at 6:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249493556
64 posts
For ToV loot this isn't that good, stats are worse than planar robes with the exception of the massive +SV's which would make it well worth wearing for raid type situations.

damn i really like the look of this robe.... to me it has everything you need... 10 int (kinda low it seems but i'm an erudite so i don' notice) 50 mana... #Anonymous, Posted: Jul 31 2001 at 6:20 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It looks like a blood red newbie robe. If it had some hp on it, it wouldn't suck...

# Aug 01 2001 at 8:59 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591749786095
13 posts
HP.... sheet..

what would 100hp health do anyway...

If you go whack mobs in ToV 100hp isn't even one hit. The high AC easilly makes up for the no hp part. The resists however can be a ******** of dmg absorbed for every resist you get..

Except for its horrid looks its a great robe no doubt

Sandortien Stormwielder, Troll Wizard - Cult of Steel (Xegony)
